sentences.arabic: وَصَلَ الرَّبِيعُ وَتَفَتَّحَتِ الأَزْهَارُ فِي الْحَدَائِقِ.
sentences.translation: Proljeće je stiglo i cvijeće se otvorilo u parkovima.
sentences.translationEn: Spring arrived and flowers bloomed in the gardens.

sentences.translation: Ljudi su izašli da uživaju u toplom vremenu.
sentences.translationEn: People went out to enjoy the warm weather.

sentences.translation: Djeca su ispunila ulice smijehom i igrama.
sentences.translationEn: Children filled the streets with laughter and games.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ كَثِيرٌ مِنَ النَّاسِ إِنَّ الرَّبِيعَ أَجْمَلُ فُصُولِ السَّنَةِ.
sentences.translation: Mnogi ljudi su rekli da je proljeće najljepše godišnje doba.
sentences.translationEn: Many people said that spring is the most beautiful season of the year.
